/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Visual.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/VisualChange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Utils/Draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Utils/Init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Utils/key.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Utils/LoadImg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Game/Utils/Move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/wall.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/Interactable/Chest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/Interactable/Door.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/Interactable/Interactable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/Interactable/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Map/Decor/Decor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/UtilsObject/Textures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/UtilsObject/Animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/UtilsObject/Collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Player/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/Player/Inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/UI/UI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Princess_Escape.dir/src/UI/DrawInventory.cpp.o -o Princess_Escape  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3_image.0.4.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3_ttf.0.2.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3.0.dylib
